CS110 (Bain): Spring 2022

Intro to Computer Programming with Python

CS110 (Bain): Spring 2022

  • Syllabus
  • Schedule
  • Assignments
  • Campuswire

Schedule

Note: This schedule is subject to change (as needed). In addition, unless otherwise indicated, tutorials are always due on Wednesday at 11:59PM and homework is always due on Friday at 11:59PM.

Week Lesson Topic Due
Week 1 03/29/22 Tue, 03/29 Lesson 0 Introduction
  • Intro to the course
03/30/22 Wed, 03/30 Lesson 1 Intro to Hardware and Software
  • What is computer?
  • What are some "real world" analogies?
  • How do we translate our thinking so the computer can understand?
04/01/22 Fri, 04/01 Lesson 2 Writing Programs
  • Programs, operators, and data types
HW0 Sign up for a Study Group / Tutorial Session
Week 2 04/04/22 Mon, 04/04 Lesson 3 Variables & Functions
  • Variables...what are they good for?
  • Using built-in Functions
04/06/22 Wed, 04/06 Lesson 4 More on Functions
  • Using functions
  • Creating your own functions
  • Defining versus invoking functions
Tutorial 1 Get Python Running
04/08/22 Fri, 04/08 Lesson 5 Lists and Tuples
  • And other strange data types
HW1 Introductory Exercises
Week 4 04/22/22 Fri, 04/22 quiz 1 Tentative Quiz 1
  • Quiz 1 of 3 (using the Lockdown Browser)
QUIZ 1
Week 7 05/13/22 Fri, 05/13 quiz 2 Tentative Quiz 2
  • Quiz 2 of 3 (using the Lockdown Browser)
QUIZ 2
Week 10 06/03/22 Fri, 06/03 quiz 3 Quiz 3 QUIZ 3
Week 11 06/07/22 Tue, 06/07 P2: Make a Recommendation App

Department of Computer Science, Northwestern University.


Special thanks to Prof. Sarah Van Wart who assembled many parts of this curriculum.
